summary: Tested Advanced Security Services: MCP Server, Vector Memory, VNS, Quantum Security, and AI Reasoning. All 20 backend tests passed. Fixed frontend bug where user.token was used instead of token from AuthContext. Frontend page now loads correctly with all tabs functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/advanced/dashboard - Returns all 5 service statuses (MCP, Memory, VNS, Quantum, AI)
GET /api/advanced/mcp/tools - Returns 6 registered MCP tools
GET /api/advanced/mcp/status - Returns MCP server status with tools_registered and total_executions
POST /api/advanced/memory/store - Stores memory entry with entry_id, namespace, trust_level
POST /api/advanced/memory/search - Searches stored memories with semantic similarity
GET /api/advanced/memory/stats - Returns memory statistics with total_entries, cases, embedding_dimension
POST /api/advanced/vns/flow - Records network flow with flow_id, direction, threat_score
GET /api/advanced/vns/stats - Returns VNS statistics with flows, dns queries, beacons
GET /api/advanced/vns/flows - Returns network flow list with count
GET /api/advanced/quantum/status - Returns quantum crypto status (simulation mode)
POST /api/advanced/quantum/keypair/kyber - Generates KYBER-768 keypair
POST /api/advanced/quantum/keypair/dilithium - Generates DILITHIUM-3 keypair
POST /api/advanced/ai/analyze - Performs threat analysis with reasoning chain
POST /api/advanced/ai/query - Responds to MITRE technique queries
GET /api/advanced/ai/ollama/status - Returns Ollama connection status (disconnected for external)
GET /api/advanced/ai/stats - Returns AI stats with MITRE techniques and patterns loaded
POST /api/advanced/ai/ollama/configure - Accepts Ollama configuration for external server
POST /api/advanced/vns/dns - Records DNS query with suspicious detection
POST /api/advanced/memory/case - Creates incident case with case_id and status
Frontend Advanced Services page loads correctly with all 6 tabs

features: 6 built-in tools (Network Scanner, Process Killer, Firewall Block IP, SOAR Playbook, Memory Dump, Deploy Honeypot)

tabs_verified: Overview - Shows all 5 service status cards
MCP Server - Shows tool registry with Load Tools button
Vector Memory - Shows semantic search and memory statistics
VNS - Shows suspicious flows, beacons, and statistics
Quantum - Shows key generation buttons and supported algorithms
AI Reasoning - Shows Ollama config (pre-filled with user IP), security query, threat analysis

fixes_applied.issue: Page used user.token instead of token from AuthContext, causing 'Failed to fetch dashboard' error
fixes_applied.fix: Changed 'const { user } = useAuth()' to 'const { user, token } = useAuth()' and replaced all user.token with token

seed_data_creation: Created test memory entry (observations namespace), test incident case (TEST_Ransomware Attack), test DNS query (suspicious-domain.duckdns.org), test network flow, and 2 quantum keypairs (Kyber, Dilithium) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Advanced Security Services are fully working: 1) MCP Server - 6 built-in tools with governed execution. 2) Vector Memory - semantic search with 128-dim embeddings, incident cases, threat intel. 3) VNS - network flows, DNS telemetry, beacon detection. 4) Quantum Security - Kyber/Dilithium keypairs in SIMULATION mode. 5) AI Reasoning - rule-based analysis with 37 MITRE techniques, Ollama integration configured for external server at 161.35.129.192:11434 (disconnected expected). Frontend page fixed and working with all 6 tabs.

mocked_apis_list: Quantum security runs in simulation mode (no actual quantum hardware - liboqs/PQCrypto required for production)
Ollama expects external server at 161.35.129.192:11434 (disconnected status is expected in test environment)
